arts.ttl: Bournemouth player ‘most liked’ by club – Must ‘dig deep into pockets’ to snatch him from Cherries
arts.sum: On Friday, AS reported AFC Bournemouth’s Dean Huijsen has ended up on Real Madrid’s radar. It was also stated the Cherries won’t sell him cheaply without mentioning figures. Saturday’s edition of Mundo Deportivo backs up the La Liga side’s interest in the defender and provides the latest. arts.ttl: Club’s ‘negotiations ‘progressing’ for Fulham player – Explained why president ‘confident’ of agreement with Marco Silva’s side
arts.sum: Palmeiras are working on signing Fulham’s Andreas Pereira which has been reported in the Brazilian media for the past week. On Christmas Eve, we covered multiple claims from Brazil which stated Palmeiras made a €20m bid for the midfielder and could raise it by €2m to convince Fulham.
